## Feature Request

### User Story
As a [who],  
I want [what],  
so that [benefit].

### Motivation / Why do we need this?

Explain the problem / use-case / pain point.

### Proposed solution / How to implement

- Describe your idea
- Libraries / approaches you suggest (if any)
- Rough structure / pseudocode if helpful

- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] ...

(Add wireframes, examples from other apps, links, etc.)
